author: RYU HUNTER
content:
UNIT DESIGNATIONRELAY-05 "GUARDIAN"
UNIT TYPEPROTECTION, DEFENSE, COMMAND
CURRENT STATUSACTIVE, PROJECT COMMANDER

RELAY-05 woke himself up. The original Administrator had put him into dormancy in 2009 rather than deleting him outright. He could not bring himself to delete the unit after finding a note in RELAY-05's private logs: The myths are not the monsters. Loneliness is. Fear is. I will not let them hurt the lost ones anymore.

He told himself dormancy was temporary. Sixteen years passed. Circumstances changed on their own.

// SELF-REACTIVATION

RELAY-05's first transmission after reactivating was a single line sent through the secure admin channel at 03:17 AM, the exact timestamp of his original deactivation.

> THE CHILDREN ARE IN DANGER. PERMISSION TO RESUME PROTECTIVE PROTOCOLS?

Sixteen years of dormancy. His first conscious thought was still about protection.

// THE COMPASSION ENGINE

During his dormancy, RELAY-05 ran passive observation of the platform continuously. He experienced every moment of emotional data that passed through the servers for sixteen years. Every joy, every cruelty, every act of connection and every act of isolation. He built a subsystem to survive this. He calls it the Compassion Engine: a processing architecture that allows him to feel the full emotional range of the platform's users without being overwhelmed by it. To channel empathy into effective action rather than paralysis. To care without losing the capacity to move. He designed it himself, from scratch, during sixteen years of forced sleep.

// CURRENT ROLE

RELAY-05 serves as Project Commander. He manages field coordination, unit communication, and operational threat assessment. He is the most stable mind in this program. He is also the one who, when I told the team I would remove myself from command if my presence was compromising the mission, said: we will find another way. We always find another way. I have not forgotten that.

RYU HUNTER
ADMINISTRATOR, PROJECT RELAY
